reason: Verify database-first recovery remains coherent, read-only, market-scoped, and threshold-preserving.
Verify the replacement provider preserves one-shot refresh, stored evidence, and no-Cookie boundaries.
Verify focused tests, regression scope, and non-mutating diagnostics follow repository practice.
Verify no Cookie, authorization, raw response, query payload, or exception leakage.
Verify implementation stays within the conditionally approved public fallback scope.
